description: Metric registration commands for transA (CANBusDrive/cTransA) test telemetry. Send these to the PLC RW port before starting a test to enable telemetry push.

notes: Use RW port (49870) for register/deregister commands.
RO port (49880) can be used for describe/verification only.
Response framing: JSON payload followed by |$> terminator.

registration_rules.path_separator_note: Forward-slash / is required for object hierarchy under CANBusDrive. Dot . syntax fails for deep paths.
registration_rules.register_syntax_note: The object= keyword is mandatory. Bare path MetricXs register <path> returns duplicate_cmd error.
registration_rules.deregister_syntax_note: Mirrors register syntax. Derived from source code (cTokenDeregister token, pairMinCount=1).
registration_rules.confirmation: Registration is silent (only $> prompt). Use MetricXs describe to verify membership changes.

commands.notes: Path and registration syntax confirmed via live PLC test (2026-05-19). Value observed: 45.0.
Path and registration syntax confirmed via live PLC test.
Live-verified path name (previously derived as BatteryVoltage). Scaling: 0.001 * NominalVoltage.
Live-verified path name (previously derived as BatteryCurrent). Scaling: NominalCurrent / 127.0.
Live-verified path name (previously derived as ControllerTemperature). Offset: -40.

signal_path_reference.hierarchy: CANBusDrive (CANOpenMasterDrive instance) -> cTransA (CANOpenMotor instance) -> signal properties
notes: All five paths live-verified as of 2026-05-19.
The CANBusDrive particle is a child of PrimaryPLC.System.
If any path fails, try describe on CANBusDrive/cTransA to enumerate available children.
